description: Add-on modules that only make sense when another module is active first.

P4.title: Defensive patent suspension requires patent comfort first.
P4.message: Select P1, P2, or P3 before adding P4.

ED-NP.title: ED-NP requires Educational Reuse Allowed.
ED-NP.message: Select ED before adding education scope refinements.

ED-ACC.title: ED-ACC requires Educational Reuse Allowed.
ED-ACC.message: Select ED before adding education scope refinements.

ED-IND.title: ED-IND requires Educational Reuse Allowed.
ED-IND.message: Select ED before adding education scope refinements.

ED-CORP.title: ED-CORP requires Educational Reuse Allowed.
ED-CORP.message: Select ED before adding education scope refinements.

CE-COMP.title: CE-COMP requires Course Extraction Restricted.
CE-COMP.message: Select CE before adding course-extraction scope refinements.

CE-CERT.title: CE-CERT requires Course Extraction Restricted.
CE-CERT.message: Select CE before adding course-extraction scope refinements.
